caption:
Aries, you've been running from the truth for so long, but it's time to face the fire that's been burning within you.

You've been pretending to be strong, but secretly you're still that scared little child who couldn't protect themselves.
The fear of being hurt again has held you back from truly loving and being loved.
You've been so focused on being the warrior, the protector, that you forgot how to be vulnerable.
But vulnerability is the key to true strength, Aries.

Your fear of vulnerability is actually a fear of being seen and loved for who you truly are.

Lucky number: 7
Lucky color: Red
Today's vibe: VULNERABLE

Take a deep breath and let's dive into the healing process together.

Music provided by sonican (https://pixabay.com/users/sonican-38947841/)

#aries #astrology #horoscope #emotionalhealing

script.hook: Aries, you've been running from the truth for so long, but it's time to face the fire that's been burning within you.
body: You've been pretending to be strong, but secretly you're still that scared little child who couldn't protect themselves.
The fear of being hurt again has held you back from truly loving and being loved.
You've been so focused on being the warrior, the protector, that you forgot how to be vulnerable.
But vulnerability is the key to true strength, Aries.
It's time to let go of the need to control everything and trust that you're enough, just as you are.
script.reveal: Your fear of vulnerability is actually a fear of being seen and loved for who you truly are.
script.cta: Take a deep breath and let's dive into the healing process together.
script.wound_theme: Fear of vulnerability and being hurt again.
script.affirmation: I trust myself to be vulnerable and open to love and connection.
